projects.name: RESTAURANT MANAGEMENT PROJECT
projects.description: Developed a user-friendly website for restaurant management, enabling online food ordering and enhancing operational efficiency.

work_history.title: Test Automation Engineer 1
work_history.summary: Successfully increased test coverage by developing and maintaining 40 automated test scripts using Selenium and Silk, addressing 4 persistent patch test failures. Improved testing efficiency by migrating 19 test cases from Test Partner to SQL, resulting in an 80% reduction in test execution time and a 20% increase in defect detection rates. Spearheaded the build, release, and publish process for 7 critical KDI content projects over 7 months, ensuring on-time delivery and maintaining a 100% customer satisfaction rate. Revived and updated 25 system test sets comprising 203 test cases, resolving issues related to screen modifications and significantly enhancing system robustness and reliability. Independently updated test cases post-screen modifications, improving accuracy by 90% and reliability by 50%, without external help. Regularly collaborated with product owners, senior automation engineers, and developers to address functional and technical challenges, fostering a culture of trust and mutual support, and documenting test cases, scenarios, and scripts for future reference and knowledge sharing. Technologies used: Selenium, Silk, SQL

work_history.title: Software Developer Intern
work_history.summary: Transformed a Java-based application into a REST API customized for a Label Warning Rest Service; enabled the generation of JSON-formatted data warnings to flag medication prescriptions and improved patient safety. Collaborated with the development team to integrate the REST API into the existing system seamlessly. Conducted comprehensive testing and debugging to ensure the accurate generation of warning data in JSON format. Documented the API specifications, including endpoints, request/response formats, and error handling procedures. Collaborated with stakeholders to gather feedback and make necessary adjustments for optimal performance and usability. Technologies used: Java, REST API
